commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a dry-run-only registry default-line metadata check for unchanged exact pinned npm plugin updates, updates the unchanged message, adds a regression test, and documents the dry-run guidance.

PR surface: Source +50, Tests +54, Docs +2. Total +106 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main dry-runs exact recorded npm specs and reports unchanged when the probe resolves back to the installed version; the linked issue supplies concrete CLI examples, but I did not run a live command in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The branch needs contributor-owned real behavior proof and a small code fix before normal maintainer review; ClawSweeper repair should not be requested while the external proof gate is unmet.

target.title: fix: clarify pinned plugin dry-run updates
target.body:
Closes #92183

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where users running `openclaw plugins update <id> --dry-run` on an exact pinned npm plugin would only see an `up to date` result, even when the registry default line had a newer release available.

## Why This Change Was Made

Exact pinned plugin-id updates still stay pinned, preserving the existing sticky-pin contract. The dry-run path now adds a best-effort registry default-line check for exact pinned npm installs and, when a newer default is resolvable, reports the pin plus an explicit `@latest` package update command instead of silently implying there is no newer registry default.

## User Impact

Operators can keep reproducible exact pins while still seeing when a newer registry default release exists during dry-run planning. Users who want to leave the pin get clear confirmation that the install is pinned; users who want to follow the default line get a command that avoids plugin-id/package-name ambiguity.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/update.test.ts`
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `pnpm docs:check-mdx`
- `pnpm format:docs:check`
- `pnpm format:check src/plugins/update.ts src/plugins/update.test.ts docs/cli/plugins.md`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
